sources.name: edge1
sources.note: Disabled 2026-06-03: edgeseed worker emits host/sni=edgeseed.xiexingk.workers.dev. GFW resets *.workers.dev TLS SNI (verified from zhongb China Mobile: workers.dev http=000, custom domain http=200). Re-enable only if the worker is redeployed with HOST set to the custom domain.

sources.name: reedge
sources.note: Primary custom-domain source (re-edgetunnel worker, host/sni=reedge.akkk.qzz.io). Custom-domain SNI passes the GFW where workers.dev does not (verified from zhongb 2026-06-03). Re-enabled as the working scheduled source.

sources.name: edt2
sources.note: cmliu edgetunnel 2.x deployed 2026-06-03 (worker edt2, custom domain edt.akkk.qzz.io, PROXYIP=proxyip.cmliussss.net for exit). Custom-domain SNI. Panel at /<UUID>. Mainland survivors are gated by the merge as usual; widens the candidate pool beyond reedge. Exit verified as SG via Check ProxyIP 2026-06-03; keep country metadata only while PROXYIP remains unchanged.

sources.name: oci2-reality
sources.note: OCI2 direct VLESS Vision REALITY node. Exit verified with api.ip.sb on 2026-06-03 as SG/Oracle Cloud. Private URI lives only in live workspace and must not be committed.

sources.name: edt2-us
sources.note: Derived from edt2 with US ProxyIP; keep only nodes proven by mainland probes.

sources.name: edt2-jp
sources.note: Derived from edt2 with JP ProxyIP; keep only nodes proven by mainland probes.

sources.name: edt2-hk
sources.note: Derived from edt2 with HK ProxyIP; keep only nodes proven by mainland probes.
